desires: Hit the ground running on tomorrow's midterm without any last-minute panic or sloppy notes.
Get out with cohort_3 tonight to prove I can handle both high-stakes work and social life simultaneously.
Stop overthinking laundry until Sunday; my energy is too valuable to waste on chores right now.

goals.description: Finalize and send the 'Decline' message to Mina (and Jae) with a firm citation of the midterm deadline, explicitly stating that academic competence supersedes social nicety.
goals.rationale: The study block is complete (progress 1.0), but my mental bandwidth isn't free until this boundary is enforced. As an assertive individual, ambiguity is a liability. Sending this draft now closes the loop immediately so I can reclaim my focus for tomorrow's exam without lingering guilt or anxiety about her reaction. The ROI of clearing this distraction is higher than any potential social friction.

goals.description: Execute the full 90-minute club night with cohort_3 tonight, ignoring all non-urgent distractions until the task is complete.
goals.rationale: My primary value right now is securing top marks on the midterm due to my short planning horizon and high risk tolerance regarding academic failure. Since I've already proven I can handle both rest and socializing by completing the study block, I don't need to make excuses. However, doing it *now* before the final send-off risks interrupting the closure of the boundary-setting process. I'll wait until after g1 is sent to ensure I'm not distracted by the logistics of the trip while still being prepared to go. If the energy dip hits after sending the message, I'll pivot immediately; otherwise, I defer to preserve peak cognitive function for the exam.

goals.description: Finish the remaining 40% of midterm review by 21:00 sharp, then immediately call it off to avoid any last-minute panic.
goals.rationale: The exam is tomorrow at 9am; failing or looking incompetent directly impacts my GPA and academic standing. I cannot afford to waste time negotiating with friends about going out when the deadline for 'good enough' is fixed.

goals.description: Send a direct text to Mina and Jae stating clearly that I am ending my night now because of the study block, cutting them off firmly so they stop nagging.
goals.rationale: Only after securing the A do I need to manage social friction. If I get sidetracked arguing about this first, I'll lose focus on the task that matters most. Sending it now prevents future annoyance without sacrificing my prep time.

goals.description: Collapse onto the bed for 60 minutes of sleep immediately after finishing the review.
goals.rationale: My brain is already fried from 2 hours of debt; I can't function well if I stay awake past 21:00. Sleep is non-negotiable for maintaining cognitive performance tomorrow, but it's secondary to actually getting the work done.

desires: Complete the midterm review before 21:00 to ensure I get an A and don't look incompetent tomorrow.
